meaning: n.(常指未满一岁的)小狗,小动物,自负的青年
examples: A puppy stepped in the fresh cement.
She can bring her puppy to school for show-and-tell.
The children squealed with delight when they saw the puppy.
So I'm constantly being awaken in the middle of the evening by my puppy dog.
If this puppy crashes and burns, Zynga is really going to be in trouble come 1Q13.
